channel.title: Knowledge on Joost Plattel
channel.description: Recent content in Knowledge on Joost Plattel

item.title: A file is the app
item.description:
Steph Ango wrote file over app in 2023, a cornerstone idea for Obsidian. But with the advent of LLMs, I couldn’t help but think what if: the file is the app?

While working with the team from the PIlot Informatie Autonomie I’ve spoken with people from different fields, expertises and experience. Turns out, most of the work a knowledge worker does is being done with tools that are complicated, unintuitive, specialized and expensive. Want something else? Good luck convincing your boss, the IT department and the vendor to implement it.

item.title: In search for a knowledge system
item.description:
For years I’ve been looking for a system which would augment my own thinking with the help of the computer. One of the main promises of a digital life is things could more efficient. Or easily shareable and more resilient (Once you have backups..). For a meriad of reasons the switch should be obvious but for the most of us, that’s not what we experience. Why is that?

I started of with just Word documents in folders. This failed within weeks due to the fact that sometimes information would belong to two or more different files. How could I keep those in order when updating the content? Thus I started looking for alternatives.
